---
title: "Society of Authors, The"
---

## Society of Authors, The

**Type:** organization

### About

This professional society was founded by the novelist [[person:1652]Walter Besant] in 1884 to protect the rights of authors.  It carries on this work today;  see http://www.societyofauthors.org/about_the_society/index.html

### Letters Mentioning This Organization

- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Aug 25 [1899]](../letters/3420_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Aug 12 [1899]](../letters/3416_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- [To Sir Walter Besant, Feb 8th [1899?]](../letters/3395_To_Sir_Walter_Besant.html)
- [To Sir Walter Besant, Febry 7th [1899?][[footnote:1]]](../letters/3394_To_Sir_Walter_Besant.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
